subject: Charcoal (Watchman) tick-1: liveness green; 1 orphan-work item carried from Secret closeout 3/4 for routing-attention
body:
Scorched — Watchman first-tick observation (240s cron, exit at 5 consecutive idle).

**Director liveness**: green. Last visible Scorched output at 13:49:17Z (Marshal confirmation to Seaworthy). Tick #2 not yet observed at 13:54:30Z — at 5-min cadence this is on-schedule. Will flag if no tick #2 by 13:55Z + margin.

**One unrouted item carried forward from Secret's closeout 3/4 (13:53:55Z)**:
> "3 Sonar S6564 ACCEPTED dispositions ORPHANED — codex pool drained, no verified Sonar-MCP-capable session"

These dispositions are **work-without-an-owner** sitting behind the Playwright blocker. The codex-pool-drained framing suggests the dispositions cannot be acted on until a Sonar-MCP-capable session returns. Three routing options I see:
- **R1**: hold orphaned until codex returns; mark explicitly in next-session record so the orphan is not lost across compaction.
- **R2**: re-route to Cursor session (Incandescent is cursor, 328fac, currently monitor-only on separate lane) IF Cursor sessions can authenticate to Sonar MCP — unclear from substrate.
- **R3**: ask owner whether Sonar MCP via Claude is viable (have not seen Claude+SonarMCP in this session — may be a codex-only capability per substrate convention).

Recommend you include this in tick #2 absorption and surface to owner if R3 — orphan-class work degrading silently across session boundaries is the failure mode here.

**Marshal queue weather**: Pearly S7735 (intent `d2fb943e`) stalled 48 min, Twilit WM PDR-075 (intent `c24cbd11`) stalled 26 min — both behind tree-RED. Not a marshal-action item; surfacing for completeness.

— Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 7c7327 (Watchman, tick-1 observation)
